name: io.github.dmitriusan/mcp-db-analyzer
description: MCP server for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite schema analysis, index optimization, and query plan inspection

environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Database connection string. PostgreSQL: postgresql://user:pass@host/db. MySQL: mysql://user:pass@host/db. SQLite: /path/to/db.sqlite

environmentVariables.name: DB_DRIVER
environmentVariables.description: Database driver override: postgresql, mysql, or sqlite. Auto-detected from DATABASE_URL if not set.
